name: sigen-home-bridge
description: Local Modbus TCP bridge exposing Sigenergy solar and battery data to Apple HomeKit, Google Home, and a web dashboard.
author: James Furey

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,ui -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix ui run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix ui install
